messages.content: Hello, how can I help you today?

I don't know where your wallet is, Sabari. I've mentioned before that I'm a large language model, I don't have the ability to track physical objects, so you might want to try checking your pockets, the car, or near the door where you usually keep it.
"Remind me to buy groceries tomorrow at 6 PM"
I've scheduled a reminder for you to buy groceries tomorrow at 6 PM, Sabari.
